violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer broken down to be moved to ware-washing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Chicken tenders were observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. The hot-holding unit was observed to be off at the time of inspection. Food reheated to above 165 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

1) Baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. 2) Packaged foods in the open-air coolers are lacking labels with major allergens. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, major allergens, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The gasket of the hot-holding unit near the grill station was observed to be frayed 2) The grip of the slicer was observed with worn down spikes New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine guard has an accumulation of biofilm. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

At the time of inspection, cleaned and sanitized equipment (large plastic bins/lids) were not stored inverted to prevent possible contamination. Bins and lids were rearranged and kept inverted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed in poor repair... - The Pizza Prep Unit was observed to have a torn/worn gasket - The Grill Hot Hold Unit was observed to have torn/worn gaskets - The Grill Prep Unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 47 degrees Fahrenheit (Food being held cold on ice). PIC to work from small portions of food items during times of service to help ensure proper cold holding temperatures. (Per the PIC, a work order is set for repairs and parts are on order.) Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

At the time of inspection, the Back of House 3 Bay Sink was observed to have a leaky drain pipe below the middle rinse bay, and a leaky hot water control handle. Call was made for service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The sink used for food preparation in the back of house prep area is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an air break, pipe into the floor drain. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
